title: Intial Encounter
text: This was the day we first encountered each other. Having matched togetehr at 3am one night

title: Hitched Together
text: This was the day we officially became a couple. I remember being so excited to finally be with you. I knew from that moment on that I was in love with you.

title: First meet/date
text: This was our first date and our first time meeting in person. We met up at starbucks and ordered the caramel moccha latte. I remember being so nervous to meet you in person, but you made me feel so comfortable and at ease. We also shared out first kiss in your Park...

title: First movie
text: This was the first time you came over to my place to watch a movie. I remember being so excited to finally have you over. We watched the movie 'Bolt' or at least tried to...

title: Meet your fam (Cass's family)
text: This was the day I met so much of your family. We cleared up the whole 'Scott' situation and found out they're all so cool.

title: Meet my mother (Greg's mother)
text: This was the day I introduced you to my mother. I was so nervous, you were nervous, but we got through it.

title: First Time Apart
text: This was teh first time i went to seychelles and for so long... We were apart for a whole month back then and it hurt so much

title: Move in together
text: This was when you were starting to move our of your house and by then you were in and out of my place... After that you basically lived with me coming to and from my place every week

title: First International Travel
text: This was the first time we went on an international trip together. We went to Singapore for UNIVERSAL STUDIOS and had an amazing time. This was my valentines gift for you back then and was well worth it. I had a blast that day.

title: Trip to Seychelles
text: This is where it all changed... You finally came to seychelles with me for a month and we had an unbelievable experience. From the food, the people, the beaches, the culture, the nightlife, the everything... It was just perfect. One of the best times of my life and you made me love my country again.

title: First Xmas... Not Quite as Apart
text: Our first Christmas not in different countries... Not quite together but much closer, much easier to deal with.

title: First New Year
text: Our first New Year Toghether. We ate good, you had risotto for the first time (which started something big) then we experience our first countdown into the new year

title: The Hardest Goodbye
text: This was one of the hardest moments of our relationship. You had to move out of our home and with family for a while, while i prepared to leave the country... my time was done studying... I was leaving back to seychelles and we knew that meants we wouldnt see each other for a long time and this would now be a long distance relationship for who knows how long. I wept and wept and so did you but you were so string still and yu still are my love. I love you so much

title: Back at Last
text: I finally cam eback for my graduation and got to spend 1.5 weeks with you. It was so good to see you and be with you again. I missed you so much. I loved every moment of it and I can't wait to see you again. We made the most of our time together after the 5 months being apart.
